basic_details.job_title: UKSSSC Assistant Accountant Recruitment 2026: Apply Online for 379 Lekhakar, Sahayak Lekhakar & Cashier Posts
basic_details.post_name: Lekhakar, Sahayak Lekhakar, Sahayak Lekhakar/Kanishtha Sampreekshak, Karyalaya Sahayak-Tritiya (Lekha), Cashier cum Sahayak Lekhakar
basic_details.short_information: Uttarakhand Subordinate Service Selection Commission (UKSSSC) has released Advertisement No. 79/उ0अ0से0च0आ0/2026 dated 21 July 2026, inviting online applications for direct recruitment to 379 vacancies of Lekhakar (Accountant), Sahayak Lekhakar (Assistant Accountant), Sahayak Lekhakar/Kanishtha Sampreekshak, Karyalaya Sahayak-Tritiya (Lekha), and Cashier cum Sahayak Lekhakar posts across various departments of Uttarakhand Group 'C' services. Eligible candidates can apply online at www.sssc.uk.gov.in from 26 July 2026 to 15 August 2026.

application_fee.details: Fee must be paid online only via Credit Card, Debit Card, Net Banking, or UPI.

age_limit.age_details: 21 to 42 years (18–42 years for one specific post) as on 01 July 2026
age_limit.details: Age is reckoned as on 01 July 2026. For most posts, candidates must be born between 02 July 1984 and 01 July 2005; for the Sahayak Lekhakar/Kanishtha Sampreekshak (Jal Sansthan) post, candidates must be born between 02 July 1984 and 01 July 2008.

qualification.details: Educational qualification requirements vary by post as specified in the notification:

vacancy_details.Post Name / Department: Sahayak Lekhakar (Power Transmission Corporation of Uttarakhand Ltd.)
Sahayak Lekhakar (Uttarakhand Jal Vidyut Nigam Ltd.)

Karyalaya Sahayak-Tritiya (Lekha) (Power Transmission Corporation of Uttarakhand Ltd.)
Cashier cum Sahayak Lekhakar (Uttarakhand Vidyut Niyamak Ayog, Dehradun)

how_to_apply: Eligible candidates can apply online through the official UKSSSC website by following these steps:
Complete Step 1: Registration with basic personal details, mobile number, and email ID.
Proceed to Step 2 and fill in Educational Qualification and other required details.
In Step 3, upload a scanned recent colour passport-size photograph, signature, and left-hand thumb impression in the prescribed format (JPG/JPEG) and size.
In Step 4, pay the applicable application fee online via Credit Card/Debit Card/Net Banking/UPI.
Review all entered details carefully before final submission, as no changes are allowed except a limited one-time edit window (excluding name, parents' names, age, and exam centre).
Click Submit to complete the application.
In Step 5, download and print the confirmation/application form for personal records.

rows.details: Lekhakar, Sahayak Lekhakar, Sahayak Lekhakar/Kanishtha Sampreekshak, Karyalaya Sahayak-Tritiya (Lekha), Cashier cum Sahayak Lekhakar
21 to 42 years (18–42 years for one specific post) as on 01 July 2026

content_sections.heading: UKSSSC Accountant Cadre Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
UKSSSC Accountant Cadre Vacancy Details
content_sections.text: UKSSSC has notified 379 vacancies across 10 post categories (A to J) under different departments, as per the following breakup:

rows.post_name_department: Sahayak Lekhakar (Power Transmission Corporation of Uttarakhand Ltd.)
Sahayak Lekhakar (Uttarakhand Jal Vidyut Nigam Ltd.)

Sahayak Lekhakar (Directorate Departmental Accounts, Uttarakhand - incl. district treasuries of Almora, Nainital, Udham Singh Nagar, Rudraprayag, Champawat, Bageshwar, Prosecution Dept., Pension & Entitlement Directorate)
Karyalaya Sahayak-Tritiya (Lekha) (Power Transmission Corporation of Uttarakhand Ltd.)
Cashier cum Sahayak Lekhakar (Uttarakhand Vidyut Niyamak Ayog, Dehradun)

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Educational qualification requirements vary by post as specified in the notification:

rows.educational_qualification: B.Com with MBA (Finance) / PGDBA (Finance) / M.Com, with minimum 5 years post-qualification experience in Govt./Semi-Govt./PSU/reputed company; and minimum 3 years service in the grade immediately below the post
Graduation with 2nd Division in Commerce with Accountancy; Certificate of Competency in computer operation; 4000 Key Depressions per hour typing speed
Graduation in Commerce from a recognized university; proficiency in Hindi or English typing at 4000 KDPH on computer
Bachelor's degree in Commerce or PG Diploma in Accountancy; O-Level Diploma in Computer Operation from a recognized institution
Graduate degree in Commerce or BBA or PG Diploma in Accountancy; Hindi typing speed of 4000 KDPH
B.Com and minimum 3 years' experience in the relevant field
Graduate degree in Commerce or BBA or PG Diploma in Accountancy; Hindi typing speed of 4000 KDPH
Graduate in Commerce with sound knowledge of Devanagari Hindi script; minimum 6000 KDPH in Hindi and 7000 KDPH in English typing; minimum one-year computer diploma/certificate
B.Com or equivalent; knowledge of accounts keeping, petty cash book, and accounting

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Age is reckoned as on 01 July 2026 . For most posts, candidates must be born between 02 July 1984 and 01 July 2005; for the Sahayak Lekhakar/Kanishtha Sampreekshak (Jal Sansthan) post, candidates must be born between 02 July 1984 and 01 July 2008.

rows.age_relaxation: 5 years relaxation in upper age limit
10 years relaxation in upper age limit
5 years relaxation in upper age limit
Actual age reduced by length of armed forces service, subject to conditions specified in the notification

content_sections.heading: Pay and Allowances
content_sections.text: Selected candidates will be placed on the following pay levels as per the 7th Pay Commission-based pay matrix: Lekhakar (Bridgekul): Level-06, Rs. 35,400 – Rs. 1,12,400 Sahayak Lekhakar (most departments): Level-05, Rs. 29,800 – Rs. 94,300 or Rs. 29,200 – Rs. 92,300 (department-wise, as detailed in Vacancy Details) Karyalaya Sahayak-Tritiya (Lekha): Level-04, Rs. 27,200 – Rs. 86,100 Cashier cum Sahayak Lekhakar: Level-04, Rs. 25,500 – Rs. 81,100 Selection will be made through an offline objective-type (multiple choice) competitive written examination carrying 100 marks (100 questions) to be completed in 2 hours. The syllabus is based on Commerce, Business Administration, and Accountancy, covering Financial Accounting, Computerised Accounting, Cost Accounting, Financial Management, Money & Banking, Business Organization & Management, Business Economics & Statistics, Marketing Management, and Auditing, Taxation & Business Laws. Each question carries equal marks; 1/4th mark is deducted for each wrong answer. Minimum qualifying marks: 45% for General/OBC/EWS and 35% for SC/ST candidates. Marking more than one answer for a question is treated as a wrong answer. A qualifying typing test is also part of the exam scheme for relevant posts. The final merit list will be prepared based on marks obtained in the written examination, followed by document/record verification.

content_sections.heading: Application Fee
content_sections.text: Fee must be paid online only via Credit Card, Debit Card, Net Banking, or UPI.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Eligible candidates can apply online through the official UKSSSC website by following these steps: Visit the official website www.sssc.uk.gov.in . Complete Step 1: Registration with basic personal details, mobile number, and email ID. Proceed to Step 2 and fill in Educational Qualification and other required details. In Step 3 , upload a scanned recent colour passport-size photograph, signature, and left-hand thumb impression in the prescribed format (JPG/JPEG) and size. In Step 4 , pay the applicable application fee online via Credit Card/Debit Card/Net Banking/UPI. Review all entered details carefully before final submission, as no changes are allowed except a limited one-time edit window (excluding name, parents' names, age, and exam centre). Click Submit to complete the application. In Step 5 , download and print the confirmation/application form for personal records.

faq.question: Q1. What is the total number of vacancies in UKSSSC Advt. No. 79/2026?
faq.answer: UKSSSC has notified a total of 379 vacancies for Lekhakar, Sahayak Lekhakar, Sahayak Lekhakar/Kanishtha Sampreekshak, Karyalaya Sahayak-Tritiya (Lekha), and Cashier cum Sahayak Lekhakar posts.

faq.question: Q2. What is the last date to apply online for UKSSSC Advt. No. 79/2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application is 15 August 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for UKSSSC Sahayak Lekhakar recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The general age limit is 21 to 42 years as on 01 July 2026, with 5 years relaxation for SC/ST/OBC candidates of Uttarakhand and 10 years for Divyang candidates. The Sahayak Lekhakar/Kanishtha Sampreekshak (Jal Sansthan) post has a relaxed lower age limit of 18 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the educational qualification required for UKSSSC Lekhakar/Sahayak Lekhakar posts?
faq.answer: Qualifications vary by post, ranging from B.Com with relevant experience for Lekhakar to B.Com/graduation in Commerce with computer typing proficiency (4000 KDPH) for most Sahayak Lekhakar posts.

faq.question: Q5. What is the selection process for this UKSSSC recruitment?
faq.answer: Selection is based on an offline objective-type written examination of 100 marks/2 hours covering Commerce, Business Administration, and Accountancy, followed by a qualifying typing test and document verification.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for UKSSSC Advt. No. 79/2026?
faq.answer: The fee is Rs. 300 for UR/OBC candidates and Rs. 150 for SC/ST/EWS/Divyang candidates; Orphan candidates are exempted from the fee.
